'''sanowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avengement|avengement]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avengement|avengement]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sanowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæneweth|sæneweth]] || [[word:sænewej|sænewej]] || [[word:sænewesh|sænewesh]] || [[word:sænewe|sænewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sanonowoth|sanonowoth]] || [[word:sanonowoj|sanonowoj]] || [[word:sanonowosh|sanonowosh]] || [[word:sanonowo|sanonowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sanowoth|sanowoth]] || [[word:sanowoj|sanowoj]] || [[word:sanowosh|sanowosh]] || [[word:sanowo|sanowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sanofwofth|sanofwofth]] || [[word:sanofwofj|sanofwofj]] || [[word:sanofwofsh|sanofwofsh]] || [[word:sanofwof|sanofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sanowotho|sanowotho]] || [[word:sanowojo|sanowojo]] || [[word:sanowosho|sanowosho]] || [[word:sanowoko|sanowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sanowoth|sanowoth]] || [[word:sanowoj|sanowoj]] || [[word:sanowosh|sanowosh]] || [[word:sanowo|sanowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sanowothol|sanowothol]] || [[word:sanowojol|sanowojol]] || [[word:sanowoshol|sanowoshol]] || [[word:sanowokol|sanowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sanowoothotho|sanowoothotho]] || [[word:sanowoojojo|sanowoojojo]] || [[word:sanowooshosho|sanowooshosho]] || [[word:sanowooko|sanowooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sanowothon|sanowothon]] || [[word:sanowojon|sanowojon]] || [[word:sanowoshon|sanowoshon]] || [[word:sanowokon|sanowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sanowothooro|sanowothooro]] || [[word:sanowojooro|sanowojooro]] || [[word:sanowoshooro|sanowoshooro]] || [[word:sanowokooro|sanowokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
